queue_item.action: Recover and formalize the divergence between aggregate continuity validation and stricter relation-integrity validation without rewriting historical records.

progress.verification: Exact source readback established non-identical capability sets: aggregate loading and record-shape validation exist only in the older repository-wide validator, while duplicate relation-target and supersession-cycle rejection exist only in the newer relation validator.

queue_item.handoff: Compose operations/continuity/validate-continuity-relations.mjs into the aggregate tools/continuity validation path, add adversarial aggregate fixtures for duplicate edges and supersession cycles, and verify the dedicated continuity workflow at the exact integration commit.

preservation_rule: This additive update does not modify operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, other teams' queue records, or Git history.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and implementation structure only; no private chat, health, pet-health, credential, contact, or unreviewed uploaded-file content.
